title: Attack on a Sudan Hospital Kills Dozens, Head of W.H.O. Says
summary_full: The group’s director general said 13 children were among those killed in the latest violence in the Darfur region, and he decried the targeting of health care facilities in the civil war.
summary_public: The group’s director general said 13 children were among those killed in the latest violence in the Darfur region, and he decried the targeting of health care facilities in the civil war.
